name: French Honey Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature.
2. Pour the ingredients into the bread machine in the order recommended by the manufacturer's instructions.
3. Select the "French bread" setting and press Start.
This recipe produces a wonderful, slightly sweet French bread with a light, crispy crust. According to Sylvia's notes, this is great bread that has a slightly sweet taste, making it the only sweet-tasting bread she has been able to produce in her DAK (Desktop Access Kit).
